Operation 'createSnapshot' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies input requirements (URL and optional metadata), specifies return value (Snapshot object), and explains the asynchronous processing behavior. This helps AI agents understand what to provide and what to expect, including the side effect of asynchronous archiving.

data.current_description: Creates a new snapshot of the given URL.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new snapshot to archive the specified URL. Accepts a CreateSnapshotRequest containing the URL and optional metadata (title, tags). Returns the created Snapshot object with its ID and initial state. The snapshot is queued for archiving and will process asynchronously to generate archive results.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies input requirements (URL and optional metadata), specifies return value (Snapshot object), and explains the asynchronous processing behavior. This helps AI agents understand what to provide and what to expect, including the side effect of asynchronous archiving.

message: Operation 'getSnapshot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is repetitive and lacks detail. Enhanced version specifies what data is returned in the Snapshot object, helping AI agents understand the response structure and available information.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a snapshot by its ID. Returns the complete Snapshot object including URL, title, tags, creation timestamp, and associated archive results.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and lacks detail. Enhanced version specifies what data is returned in the Snapshot object, helping AI agents understand the response structure and available information.

message: Operation 'patchSnapshot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.description_suggestion: Partially updates a snapshot by ID using the provided UpdateSnapshotRequest. Supports updating title, tags, and other metadata. Only specified fields are modified; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated Snapshot object. Changes are persisted immediately.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and uninformative. Enhanced version clarifies that this is a partial update operation, specifies which fields can be modified, explains the partial update semantics, and indicates the return value and persistence behavior. data.reasoning: Original description is too brief. data.reasoning: Description lacks domain context about what archive results represent. Added clarification that archive results are outputs from archiving operations and their relationship to snapshots, helping AI agents understand the semantic meaning and use cases.
